positive: Minimalist abstract cosmic swirl of vibrant teal, burnt orange, and deep navy blue ink. The design features clean, flowing bioluminescent nebula patterns forming a central, symmetrical mandala composition. The style is highly vectorized, with smooth gradients and sharp, clean edges, resembling a sophisticated geometric tattoo art. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for repetition on fabric. Cinematic, high contrast, clean print surface, graphic novel style, crisp lines, ethereal glow, macro photography perspective.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, messy, grainy, low resolution, dirty
